name: version-sentinel
description: Hard-blocks dependency additions and version changes until Claude records a WebSearch-verified latest-version check.

disable.title: Disable blocking
disable.description: If true, all version-sentinel hooks no-op (PreToolUse block, SessionStart prereq warning, PostToolUse auto-record). Equivalent to VS_DISABLE=1.

window_hours.title: Check freshness window (hours)
window_hours.description: How long a /vs-record entry stays fresh before the hook re-blocks.
